clauses.obligation: Royalty 7%, Brand Fee 4%, IT Fee, inspection numbers, EZBook, PTP360, HomeManual, Financial Reporting, Brand Conference

clauses.exceptions: Performance plan if missed once; termination if missed 2 consecutive years

clauses.obligation: Open within 120 days of training completion
Complete Initial Training Program to franchisor's sole subjective satisfaction
clauses.money: Included in franchise fee for franchisee; at franchisee expense for employees

clauses.obligation: Add full-time inspector or marketing person within 12 months; maintain minimum 1 inspector + 1 marketing person from year 2
Maintain E&O, GL, auto, business property, cyber insurance at $1M/$2M levels
$4,000 fee + $15,000 referral + general release + new agreement
No competing business during term; 2 years post-term within territory
Binding arbitration in Tampa, FL under AAA rules
clauses.exceptions: 1-year limitation period; punitive damages waived; class action waived; subject to state law

clauses.obligation: Unconditional guarantee of all franchise agreement obligations
clauses.waivers: Right to require proceeding against franchisee first; right to exhaust security

clauses.obligation: May enter neighbor's territory only if specifically asked by referral source from own territory. Must refer out-of-territory customer contacts.
Coordinate marketing, share opportunities, communicate regularly, honor established paid marketing relationships, avoid conflicts
Broad release of all claims from beginning of world to date of release
clauses.exceptions: Subject to state overrides (CA, IN, MD, MN, NY, ND, WA exclude statutory claims)

clauses.obligation: No competing business during association and 2 years post within territory
clauses.who: All principals, managers, employees with access

clauses.obligation: Perpetual obligation to maintain confidentiality. No copying, no disclosure, no use for others.
Cannot solicit or hire franchisee employees, contractors, or agents

note: All key exhibits (G, G-1 through G-5) were directly clause-walked. No exhibits were deferred.
